title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent with a core of read, write, edit, and bash capabilities. Extensions can be written or installed from npm and git, and it supports multiple language models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6. The framework emphasizes customization and cost efficiency against rate-limited frontier models.
